[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 010001000 2

01 10 010001001 3
12 21 100000101 3
23 32 000100001 2
34 43 000000011 2
45 54 000000001 1
56 65 010000000 1
67 76 010011000 3
70 07 010001000 2 match 7

02 20 000100001 2
13 31 011000001 3
24 42 100000001 2
35 53 011100001 4
46 64 000001000 1
57 75 011000000 2
60 06 010001000 2 match 7
71 17 111001100 5

36 63 010000000 1
47 74 100001000 2
50 05 010100001 3
61 16 010001000 2 match 7
72 27 100010100 3

26 62 000010000 1
